untranslatable_reason: Triple top formation detection requires pattern recognition logic (identifying three peaks with specific height relationships and support levels between them). The allowed indicators do not include pattern detection capabilities. The signal requires: (1) identification of three distinct price peaks, (2) measurement of reversal support levels between peaks, (3) comparison of these support levels to find the highest one, and (4) detection of price breaking below that specific level. This multi-step peak/valley identification and pattern geometry analysis cannot be expressed using only the provided price-based and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to use pivot point support (s1) as a proxy for support level detection, but this does not capture the specific triple-top formation requirement. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of standard technical indicators.
